subject: english

sections.heading: Word Bank (Part 1)
sections.content: Universe: the totality of all matter and energy that exists in the vastness of space. Planet: an astronomical object that orbits a star. Stars: astronomical objects visible as bright points of light. Orbit: a single revolution of an astronomical object around another.

sections.heading: Word Bank (Part 2)
sections.content: Cosmonaut: astronaut in the Russian space programme. Galaxies: groups of billions of stars, planets, gas and dust. Eclipse: partial or complete hiding of an astronomical object. Astronaut: someone trained to travel in space. Gravity: the attraction due to gravitation exerted by Earth or other astronomical objects.

learning_objectives: Use Vocabulary: Astronomy vocabulary in context
Identify important words in Vocabulary: Astronomy
